data.title: Global nations rush to secure oil amid escalating attacks at sea. US, Israel intensify strikes on Iran; Lebanon toll rises.
data.description: The U.S. and Israel have carried out additional attacks on Iran, as crowds in Iran mourned the loss of military commanders killed in the conflict. Israel also conducted airstrikes in Lebanon, resulting in a rise in the death toll in the region.
IDF Spokesperson: 'In a quick closing of the circle: the IDF attacked in southern Lebanon the launcher from which the launches toward the Western Galilee were carried out a short time ago'

data.title: New probe targets key trading partners including EU, China, and India; may result in tariffs due to Supreme Court rulings.
data.description: An ongoing trade investigation is targeting the European Union, China, India, and several other nations. This investigation is expected to result in the imposition of tariffs as replacements for those invalidated by the Supreme Court.

data.title: Warner Bros. has two Oscar nominees, "One Battle After Another" and "Sinners," without showing favoritism.
data.description: Warner Bros. is the production studio responsible for two films, "One Battle After Another" and "Sinners." The studio has made efforts to ensure equal promotion and support for both films, without showing favoritism towards either one.
Trump administration tells the oil industry to prepare for a possible Jones Act waiver, according to sources.

data.title: Researchers Clarify How Ketogenic Diets Treat Epilepsy, Guiding Future Therapy Development
data.description: In a recent publication in The Lancet Neurology, researchers from the University of Colorado Anschutz presented a comprehensive review shedding light on the effectiveness of the diet and potential new avenues for treatment. The review offers insight into the reasons behind the diet's success and highlights potential areas for further research. This important analysis provides researchers, clinicians, and families with a better understanding of the diet's impact. The review was shared on March 12, 2026, in AURORA, Colo., marking a significant step in advancing knowledge in this field.

data.title: Tesla China Sales Show It Isn't Struggling As Much As Its Rivals
data.description: Newly released data shows that in February, Tesla experienced a 42% increase in retail sales, in contrast to a 32% decrease in the rest of the electric vehicle (EV) market. This indicates that Tesla is faring better than its competitors in the industry. Specifically in China, Tesla's sales numbers demonstrate resilience compared to other EV brands.

data.title: Bassett Announces Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. based in Bassett, Virginia, revealed on March 12, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved a standard quarterly dividend of $0.20 for each share of common stock under the Nasdaq symbol BSET. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on May 29, 2026, to all shareholders recorded as of May 15, 2026, the official record date.

data.title: New Research from Snapchat and Alter Agents Reveals Social Media Drives Telecom Decisions, with 55% of Snapchatters Purchasing After Seeing an Ad
data.description: Research conducted in Los Angeles on March 12, 2026, delves into the telecommunications purchasing process for Gen Z and Millennials. The study emphasizes the impact of life events and influencer content on the decision to switch carriers. Snapchat and Alter Agents jointly presented the findings, shedding light on the significant role these factors play in driving switching behavior.

data.title: EcoVadis and Watershed partner to close the Scope 3 data gap
data.description: In a strategic move to enhance their Carbon Data Network, EcoVadis has partnered with Watershed and introduced the EcoVadis PCF Calculator. This partnership marks a pivotal step towards achieving EcoVadis' goal of establishing the most interconnected platform for carbon-related data in the market. The collaboration was announced in both Paris and New York on March 12, 2026. EcoVadis aims to solidify its position as the global standard for resilience by leveraging this partnership.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Hisense/
data.description: Hisense recently announced the launch of their new line of 2026 ULED MiniLED TVs, aimed at providing premium big-screen experiences for consumers at various price points. The news was released on March 9, 2026, via PR Newswire. A spokesperson for Hisense indicated that changes have been made to the availability details of the products. For more information, please refer to the complete news release.

data.title: Propylene Oxide Market to Reach USD 33.7 Billion by 2032, Driven by Polyurethane Demand, Says Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 12, 2026, the worldwide Propylene Oxide Market had a value of USD 21.7 billion in 2025. Projections suggest that it will increase to USD 33.7 billion by 2032, exhibiting a growth rate of 5.8% during the period from 2025 to 2032. The surge in the global Propylene Oxide Market can be attributed to advancements in Polyether Polyols, HPPO innovation, and other factors.

data.title: Firefly Rockets Lockheed Payload To Orbit: Is FLY a High‑Beta Defense Trade?
data.description: Shares of Firefly Aerospace Inc. (NASDAQ: FLY) experienced a significant surge following the successful delivery of a Lockheed Martin Corp. (NYSE: LMT) payload by the company's Alpha rocket. This achievement has sparked interest in whether Firefly is becoming a high-beta option for trading defense space spending. FLY stock witnessed an increase of over 18% in morning trading on Thursday, as Firefly confirmed the success of its Alpha Flight 7 mission in reaching orbit and deploying a Lockheed technology demonstrator. This accomplishment signifies a positive return to flight for the small-lift rocket, overcoming a prior anomaly and a series of test-heavy missions. This development adds to the company's fluctuating performance since its IPO in 2025.

data.title: Boxwood Partners Caps a High-Impact 2025 and Expands Advisory Platform Heading into 2026
data.description: A prominent middle-market M&A advisory firm based in Jupiter, Florida, has reported a successful conclusion to the year 2025. Boxwood Partners shared that they achieved significant client outcomes and enhanced their sector expertise during this time. This accomplishment signifies a positive trend for the firm, as they continue to advise middle-market founders.

data.title: Call for Global Entries: Globee® Awards for Innovation Invite Global Companies Leading Industry Transformation
data.description: In San Francisco on March 12, 2026, the Globee® Awards for Innovation celebrated outstanding achievements from organizations operating globally across various sectors and markets. These awards are a part of the renowned Globee Awards, which recognize excellence based on merit and data-driven evaluations. This recognition program highlights innovative contributions from companies working in multiple countries, industries, and markets.

data.title: OCEAN Completes SOC 1 Type 1 Examination, Building on SOC 2 Type 1 Attestation and Advancing Toward Type 2 Reports
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in CHEYENNE, Wyo., Mummolin, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, OCEAN, the inaugural completely transparent and permissionless Bitcoin mining pool globally, achieved a SOC 1 Type 1 examination, confirming its credibility through external validation.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Fire Protection System (SBT-2226)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an inventor from San Diego, California discussed their innovative fire protection system aimed at safeguarding homes and structures from wildfires. The inventor conceptualized the FIRE HOME PROTECTION, aiming to provide a swift and efficient defense mechanism. The system is designed to offer quick and effective protection, helping to mitigate the impact of wildfires. Further details about the invention were not provided in the news piece.

data.title: Kennedy Funding Closes $2.1 Million Land Loan on 18-Lot Subdivision in Forsyth County, Georgia
data.description: In Englewood, N.J. on March 12, 2026, Edwin Urrego, an executive loan officer at Kennedy Funding, has recently facilitated a significant financial transaction at the prestigious Suwanee Preserve. This experienced professional, well-versed in land loans, assisted a developer in cashing out and refinancing their project. The developer, seeking assistance in managing their financial needs, approached Kennedy Funding for a solution. This is part of a trend where investors and developers nationwide are availing themselves of the services provided by private lending institutions like Kennedy Funding. This transaction showcases the ongoing growth and importance of private financing in the real estate development sector.
